message:
fix(storage): add is_template column migration and update idx_issues_ready

Three schema changes to support template issue filtering:

1. Pre-schema migration: unconditionally drop idx_issues_ready before
   SCHEMA_SQL recreates it, ensuring the index definition stays in
   sync with code. DROP INDEX is O(1) and recreation is fast for
   typical issue counts.

2. Column migration: add is_template INTEGER DEFAULT 0 to the issues
   table if it doesn't already exist. This column is required by the
   updated idx_issues_ready index definition.

3. Index update: extend the idx_issues_ready partial index WHERE clause
   to exclude template issues (is_template = 0 OR is_template IS NULL),
   preventing templates from appearing in ready-issue queries while
   maintaining backward compatibility with rows that predate the
   column addition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
